mapper.select: SELECT w.*, sp.name AS part_name FROM ai_weekly_forecast w LEFT JOIN spare_part sp ON sp.code = w.part_code WHERE w.part_code = #{partCode} AND w.week_start >= CURDATE() ORDER BY w.week_start ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_weekly_forecast (part_code, week_start, predict_qty, p10, p25, p75, p90, dist_mu, dist_sigma, algo_type, model_version, adi, cv2) VALUES
(#{r.partCode}, #{r.weekStart}, #{r.predictQty}, #{r.p10}, #{r.p25}, #{r.p75}, #{r.p90}, #{r.distMu}, #{r.distSigma}, #{r.algoType}, #{r.modelVersion}, #{r.adi}, #{r.cv2})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE predict_qty = VALUES(predict_qty), p10 = VALUES(p10), p25 = VALUES(p25), p75 = VALUES(p75), p90 = VALUES(p90), dist_mu = VALUES(dist_mu), dist_sigma = VALUES(dist_sigma), algo_type = VALUES(algo_type), model_version = VALUES(model_version), adi = VALUES(adi), cv2 = VALUES(cv2), create_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_weekly_forecast WHERE part_code = #{partCode} AND week_start = #{weekStart}
